hook.text: GREENWOOD SET FOR ROMA AS UNITED CASH IN

beats.text: ROMA HAVE AGREED PERSONAL TERMS WITH GREENWOOD
ATLETICO MADRID ARE RIVALLING ROMA FOR HIS SIGNATURE
UNITED HOLD A 50% SELL-ON FROM THE MARSEILLE DEAL
UNITED POCKET MILLIONS FROM HIS NEXT TRANSFER FEE

caption: Mason Greenwood's next chapter is nearly written — and United are set to benefit 🔴 Romano and Corriere dello Sport confirm Roma have agreed personal terms with the former United forward, now at Marseille. But Atletico Madrid are rivalling Roma for his signature, pushing the fee higher. The key United angle: when Greenwood left Old Trafford for Marseille, United kept a 50% sell-on clause. Every pound Marseille make on this deal, United take half the profit. Greenwood has reportedly scored 28 goals on loan — his stock is soaring. Should Greenwood have been given a second chance at United? 👇 REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano / Corriere dello Sport. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow #greenwood
